property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;c:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;;.

testcase.name: openAmazonHomepage
testcase.system-out: Current URL: https://www.amazon.in/ Page title : Online Shopping site in India: Shop Online for Mobiles, Books, Watches, Shoes and More - Amazon.in Pass : Amazon homepage loaded. Title: Online Shopping site in India: Shop Online for Mobiles, Books, Watches, Shoes and More - Amazon.in Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_1/homepage.png
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: searchForLaptop
testcase.system-out: Pass Search for laptop begins

testcase.name: verifySearchResults
testcase.system-out: Pass Search results appeared. Count: 22 Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_1/search_results.png

testcase.name: verifyResultHasTitlePriceRating
testcase.system-out: Pass product titles found count: 30 Pass product prices found count: 98 Pass product ratings found count: 59

testcase.name: verifyFirstProduct
testcase.system-out: JS extracted 16 product URLs from result cards. Navigating to product 1: https://www.amazon.in/Acer-Premium-Windows-AL15-41-Display/dp/B0CWTYGPH8/ref=sr_1_3?crid=2C8C92SBNW72&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.KquEe0YzGlXG-P83ObD5_SUyKdabP0VCbtBsDzVFQgroQnvO3kU0a3dQ7QUR_qGlMO7TLFKiXLY4aW2EjI99ynnSOlCSFhEhcR0jtkbIWCr188wbsMk1FzBrUvdKcfNWzW4MUekZDkqmoOBXXGyOtd4Aefg6pVMZ_C2DXPle_vxDRIAqKxJU6Qd03kB8BTF9SG1_-RdVVb9g25h91D-cSm9E1ZnYTvHCJSmYzKIt__0.APXHpqKsa_weq_7KhfzDVRFEp2QILtowuSyx47nMm6w&dib_tag=se&keywords=Laptop&qid=1776906486&sprefix=laptop%2Caps%2C467&sr=8-3 Pass product 1 title verified: acer Aspire Lite, AMD Ryzen 3 5300U Processor, 16 GB RAM, 512GB SSD, Full HD, 15.6"/39.62cm, Windows 11 Home, Steel Gray, 1.59KG, AL15-41, Metal Body, Premium Thin and Light Laptop Pass product 1 price: Pass product 1 availability: In stock Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_1/product1_details.png

testcase.name: verifySecondProduct
testcase.system-out: JS extracted 16 product URLs from result cards. Navigating to product 2: https://www.amazon.in/HP-i3-1315U-Anti-Glare-Micro-Edge-fd0569TU/dp/B0F4R5W1NC/ref=sr_1_4?crid=2C8C92SBNW72&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.tX-GDyIVdQZRwMeD7qa7_KJ897YOkqNhADO4W0IFTX5ic9fQdrzrwjsYRczqUoC-MO7TLFKiXLY4aW2EjI99ynnSOlCSFhEhcR0jtkbIWCr188wbsMk1FzBrUvdKcfNWzW4MUekZDkqmoOBXXGyOtaBO0mRd7UEv61IikByZMSvK4a--G8s6xfCB7_8E9-JvSG1_-RdVVb9g25h91D-cSm9E1ZnYTvHCJSmYzKIt__0.LH1f1wteDtVIWQPLxqQ6rj305AMiE2LoPVK9UKAXCIw&dib_tag=se&keywords=Laptop&qid=1776906536&sprefix=laptop%2Caps%2C467&sr=8-4 Pass product 2 title verified: HP 15, 13th Gen Intel Core i3-1315U Laptop (8GB DDR4,512GB SSD) Anti-Glare, Micro-Edge,15.6''/39.6cm, FHD, Win11,M365 Basic(1yr),Office Home24, Silver,1.59kg, FHD Camera w/Privacy Shutter, fd0569TU Pass product 2 price: Pass product 2 availability: In stock Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_1/product2_details.png

testcase.name: verifyThirdProduct
testcase.system-out: JS extracted 16 product URLs from result cards. Navigating to product 3: https://www.amazon.in/Samsung-Galaxy-Dynamic-Battery-Speakers/dp/B0GT17J49N/ref=sr_1_5?crid=2C8C92SBNW72&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.tX-GDyIVdQZRwMeD7qa7_KJ897YOkqNhADO4W0IFTX5ic9fQdrzrwjsYRczqUoC-MO7TLFKiXLY4aW2EjI99ynnSOlCSFhEhcR0jtkbIWCr188wbsMk1FzBrUvdKcfNWzW4MUekZDkqmoOBXXGyOtaBO0mRd7UEv61IikByZMSvK4a--G8s6xfCB7_8E9-JvSG1_-RdVVb9g25h91D-cSm9E1ZnYTvHCJSmYzKIt__0.LH1f1wteDtVIWQPLxqQ6rj305AMiE2LoPVK9UKAXCIw&dib_tag=se&keywords=Laptop&qid=1776906571&sprefix=laptop%2Caps%2C467&sr=8-5 Pass product 3 title verified: Samsung Galaxy Book6 Ultra (Gray, 32GB RAM, 1TB SSD) | Intel Core Ultra X7 (Series 3) | 16" WQXGA+ Dynamic AMOLED 2X with Touch Screen | 30Hrs Battery Life | 120 Hz | Six Speakers | AI PC Pass product 3 price: Pass product 3 availability: In stock Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_1/product3_details.png

testcase.name: searchForHeadphones
testcase.system-out: Test Case 1: Passed Pass Search for headphones begins

testcase.name: openFirstProduct
testcase.system-out: Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_2/search_results.png JS extracted 16 product URLs. testcase.name: verifyProductNameAndPrice
testcase.system-out: Pass product name verified: Boat Rockerz 411, 40Ms Low Latency, 40Hrs Battery, 40Mm Drivers, ENx Tech, Stream Ad Free Music via App Support, Bluetooth Headphones, Wireless Over Ear Headphone with Mic (Active Black) Pass product price verified: Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_2/product_details.png

testcase.name: addToCart
testcase.system-out: Found add-to-cart via id: add-to-cart-button Pass clicked add to cart Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_2/added_to_cart.png

testcase.name: goToCartAndVerify
testcase.system-out: Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_2/cart_page.png Pass cart item found (signed-in cart item) Pass item in cart: Boat Rockerz 411, 40Ms Low Latency, 40Hrs Battery, 40Mm Drivers, ENx Tech, Stream Ad Free Music via App Support, Bluetooth Headphones, Wireless Over Ear Headpho…

testcase.name: verifyCartQuantityAndTotal
testcase.system-out: Pass Cart quantity: 1 Pass Cart subtotal: ₹1,105.00

testcase.name: removeItemAndVerifyEmptyCart
testcase.system-out: Pass clicked delete button Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_2/empty_cart.png Pass Cart is empty: Shopping Cart

testcase.name: openAppleAccountPage
testcase.system-out: Test Case 2: Passed Page title: Create Your Apple Account Current URL: https://account.apple.com/account Switched into iframe: iframe[src*='appleid'] Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_3/page_loaded.png Pass : Apple account page loaded successfully

testcase.name: verifyFormFieldsVisible
testcase.system-out: Switched into iframe: iframe[src*='appleid'] Pass : Form fields visible. Count: 7 Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_3/form_fields_visible.png

testcase.name: verifyRequiredFieldsOnBlankSubmit
testcase.system-out: Switched into iframe: iframe[src*='appleid'] Pass : Required fields validation triggered. Errors found: 21 Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_3/required_fields_error.png

testcase.name: verifyInvalidEmailFormat
testcase.system-out: Switched into iframe: iframe[src*='appleid'] Pass : Invalid email error shown Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_3/invalid_email.png

testcase.name: verifyWeakPasswordError
testcase.system-out: Switched into iframe: iframe[src*='appleid'] Pass : Weak password error shown Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_3/weak_password_error.png

testcase.name: verifyPasswordMismatchError
testcase.system-out: Switched into iframe: iframe[src*='appleid'] Pass : Password mismatch error shown Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_3/password_mismatch_error.png

testcase.name: verifyValidInputsAccepted
testcase.system-out: Switched into iframe: iframe[src*='appleid'] Visible input fields: 7 Pass Filled first name Pass Filled last name Pass Filled email Pass Filled password field Pass Filled password field Screenshot saved: screenshots/test_case_3/valid_inputs.png Pass : Valid inputs entered successfully (5 fields filled)
